top_signals.title: ICE Reverses Plan to Use Mega-Warehouses for Migrant Detention
top_signals.summary: The Department of Homeland Security is backing away from a controversial plan to turn empty warehouses into immigration detention centers and will keep relying largely on existing jails run by private contractors and state and local partners.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin’s deeply discounted versus AI-stocks, but hawkish Fed risk lingers: Bitwise
top_signals.summary: Bitwise analysts say Bitcoin trades in a historical value zone, but hawkish Federal Reserve signals and a competition for liquidity could sideline buyers.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Dog Recovers From Screwworm But Origin Puzzles Officials
top_signals.summary: A New Mexico dog infected with the New World screwworm has recovered, but questions remain over how the animal contracted the parasite.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Opening speech by Commissioner Hansen at the DG AGRI and the European Investment Bank (EIB) event 'Boosting generational renewal in EU agriculture – improving access to finance for young farmers'
top_signals.summary:

top_signals.title: 5 reasons Microsoft 365 backup isn’t enough for business data protection
top_signals.summary: Microsoft 365 helps keep services running, but protecting and recovering business data remains your responsibility. Acronis breaks down five gaps organizations should consider when evaluating Microsoft 365 data protection. [...]
